evals.prompt: 用 stock-selector 跑一遍东方财富 A 股初筛，只保存并集 union.csv 和 summary.md，不要做深度报告。
evals.expected_output: Uses the bundled Eastmoney script, verifies both parser condition lists, saves only union.csv and summary.md under inbox/stock-selector/<day>/raw, reports condition counts/intersection/union, removes match-source columns, and for duplicate stocks uses condition 1 values while appending condition 2-only fields at the end.

evals.prompt: 基于 stock-selector 的并集结果做初步筛选，给我 10-20 只优先分析股票，只能使用 xuangu 返回的数据。
evals.expected_output: Uses the investment-analysis framework to create a concise shortlist using only the xuangu union.csv data, explains scoring with valuation, quality, cash flow, leverage, industry, and timing fields, and does not call investment-analysis data scripts.

evals.prompt: 对 stock-selector 初筛后的股票生成深入分析报告，保存到 inbox/stock-selector/今天日期，最多 5 个子 agent 并行。
evals.expected_output: Uses investment-analysis for deeper analysis after preliminary selection, batches deep report work with no more than five active subagents, and saves one markdown report per stock under inbox/stock-selector/<YYYYMMDD>/.
